entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Transgenic sorghum plants developed for insect resistance against the spotted stem borer

entities.name: CRY1AC GENE
entities.description: A synthetic gene from Bacillus thuringiensis used to confer insect resistance

entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: The soil bacterium that is the source of the cry1Ac gene

entities.name: WOUND-INDUCIBLE PROMOTER
entities.description: A promoter that triggers gene expression in response to tissue wounding

entities.name: MPIC1 GENE
entities.description: The maize protease inhibitor gene from which the wound-inducible promoter was derived

entities.name: PARTICLE BOMBARDMENT
entities.description: A technique used to deliver the synthetic cry1Ac gene into shoot apices

entities.name: DIRECT SOMATIC EMBRYOGENESIS
entities.description: A process used to regenerate transgenic plants from transformed shoot apices

entities.name: BASTA
entities.description: A herbicide used as a selection agent to identify transformed plants

entities.name: POLYMERASE CHAIN REACTION
entities.description: A molecular technique used to characterize the insertion of the cry1Ac gene

entities.name: SOUTHERN BLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A molecular technique used to determine the number of cry1Ac gene insertions

entities.name: ENZYME-LINKED IMMUNOSORBANT ASSAY
entities.description: A biochemical assay used to quantify the accumulation of Cry1Ac protein

entities.name: CRY1AC PROTEIN
entities.description: The protein product of the cry1Ac gene that provides insecticidal activity

entities.name: CHILO PARTELLUS
entities.description: The spotted stem borer, the target insect pest for which resistance was developed

entities.name: INSECT BIOASSAYS
entities.description: Tests used to evaluate the resistance of transgenic sorghum against Chilo partellus

entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand or reduce damage from insect pests

entities.name: LEAF DAMAGE
entities.description: The extent of tissue loss in leaves caused by insect infestation

entities.name: LARVAL MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of death among the neonate larvae of the spotted stem borer

entities.name: WEIGHT REDUCTION
entities.description: The decrease in larval weight compared to those fed on control plants

entities.name: BT DELTA-ENDOTOXIN
entities.description: The insecticidal toxin produced by the Bt gene
